{{Quote|Your victims were wrong, Uda-Khalid. It was a small target, but you had a heart after all.|Jedi Knight Mace Windu after slaying Uda-Khalid|<ref name="Survivors">{{Tales|13|Survivors (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Uda-Khalid''' was a ruthless [[Near-Human]] killer and dictator on a small [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] tracked him down and forced him to see the [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] souls of his victims. Mace proceeded to duel with Khalid, which ended as Mace slew the dictator.

{{Char-stub}}
